avatar_color.description: Optional hex color code for the agent avatar.

avatar_symbol.description: Optional symbol/initials for the agent avatar.

description.description: Description of what the agent does.

labels.description: Optional labels for categorizing and organizing agents.

visibility.description: **Technical Preview; added in 9.4.0.** Optional visibility setting: `public` (any privileged user can read/write), `shared` (any privileged user can read, only owner can write), `private` (only owner can read/write).
